mapper.select:
SELECT t1.ID, t1.CONTRACT_NAME, t1.CONTRACT_CODE, t1.CONTRACT_AMOUNT, t1.USE_COMPANY_ID, t1.USE_COMPANY_NAME, t1.START_DATE, t1.END_DATE, t1.APPLY_SCOPE, t1.STATUS, t1.CONTRACT_TYPE, t1.EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID, t2.DICT_LABEL contractTypeLable
FROM E_COST_CONTRACT_INFO t1 LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA t2 ON t2.DICT_VALUE = t1.CONTRACT_TYPE AND t2.DICT_TYPE = 'CONTRACT_TYPE' where t1.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_CONTRACT_INFO ( ID, CONTRACT_NAME, CONTRACT_CODE, CONTRACT_AMOUNT, USE_COMPANY_ID, USE_COMPANY_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, APPLY_SCOPE, STATUS, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, CONTRACT_TYPE) VALUES ( #{id}, #{contractName}, #{contractCode}, #{contractAmount}, #{useCompanyId}, #{useCompanyName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{applyScope}, #{status}, #{externalCompanyId}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contractType})
mapper.update: UPDATE E_COST_CONTRACT_INFO SET CONTRACT_NAME = #{contractName}, CONTRACT_CODE = #{contractCode}, CONTRACT_AMOUNT = #{contractAmount}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, APPLY_SCOPE = #{applyScope}, STATUS = #{status}, EXTERNAL_COMPANY_ID = #{externalCompanyId}, CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType}, UPDATE_USER = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
